display_text: Hand of Midas, Cost: 2200: Active ability (Transmute) instantly kills a non-hero target, granting 160 gold and a Madstone bundle if the target is a neutral creep. Cannot target Ancient creeps. Used to accelerate farm, gaining extra gold beyond the normal bounty and additional neutral item drops. Provides permanent bonus attack speed. Stats: Gold: 160 (unreliable), Attack Speed: +35, Active CD: 90s, Charges: 1.

display_text: Hand of Midas, Cost: 2200: An investment item that accelerates gold and neutral item acquisition for farming cores. The 90-second cooldown dictates a timing window for usage, prioritizing high-value neutral creeps. It provides no direct combat stats or team fight contribution beyond raw attack speed. Stats: CD: 90s.

display_text: Hand of Midas, Cost: 2200: Critical early purchase on heroes who scale well with attack speed and benefit from accelerated farm timing. Especially potent for heroes who can convert the attack speed into DPS or who need to reach key items quickly. The Madstone bundle drop also accelerates neutral item progression. Stats: CD: 90s.

display_text: Hand of Midas, Cost: 2200: A pure farm acceleration item with minimal combat impact.
